requires: Update adapterFiles / adapters if shape changes
Document migration in contracts/SNAPSHOT_CHANGELOG.md or release notes
Keep forbiddenRemovals honored for at least one release
rules.backwardCompat: Js.Core.html adapters must accept prior response shape until callers migrate

versionBumpChecklist: Add a rules[] entry describing fromVersion → toVersion
Verify adapterFiles and callSiteFiles still match codebase
